{{Quote|If you are a great warrior, then you may yet be able to destroy them where I have failed.|translated=1|Garn to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], speaking of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Garn''' was a [[warleader]] of [[The One]]'s tribe of [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] on [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]]. A group of Garn's [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] were killed by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] who were stranded on Lehon.

==Behind the scenes==
If players agree to meet with the One upon meeting the Black Rakata for the first time, Garn will be friendly to the player and ask them to bring him the head of the Mandalorian leader who camped in front of the [[Temple of the Ancients]]. In reward, he gives the location of an equipment footlocker. However, this mission can only be completed if the player is friendly to the Black Rakata in the initial encounter.
